name: Mimi's French-Toasted Cottage Cheese Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each slice of bread in half.
2. Beat eggs with milk and pinch of salt.
3. In a separate bowl, mash cottage cheese until smooth with another pinch of salt, cinnamon, sugar, and vanilla, adjusting to taste.
4. Spread one-fourth of the cheese filling evenly over four slices of bread.
5. Top each spread slice of bread to form half-sandwiches.
6. Gently dip and soak each sandwich in egg-milk mixture, turning so both sides of each sandwich absorb liquid. Let excess drip off.
7. Heat unsalted butter in a 10-inch skillet until hot but not brown, then add sandwiches.
8. Reduce heat and fry slowly for 5 to 7 minutes, or until the first side is golden. Turn and brown the second side over low heat. If the sandwiches fry too quickly, the filling will not be warm.
9. Serve immediately, allowing two halves of each portion. Sprinkle with cinnamon-sugar and top with sour cream and strawberries, or pass all at the table.
